message:
feat(focus,modal): expand host-focus-aware focus management with additional test coverage

Additional FocusManager methods and ModalFocusCoordinator improvements
(+49 lines) extending the host_focused tracking for edge cases in
trap push/pop sequences when the terminal is backgrounded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
